generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor (IM) measuring permanent‑magnet synchronous motor phase current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the ASM motor shaft measuring angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the cycloidal gearbox measuring output shaft angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance SimulinkSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Simulink execution component providing simulated torque and speed data streams"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimMotorTorqueMeasurementTransmitted,
                           SimMotorAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted,
                           SimSecondaryGearboxTorqueMeasurementTransmitted,
                           SimSecondaryGearboxAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted,
                           SimOutputTorqueMeasurementTransmitted,
                           SimOutputAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance CurrentMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoderSensor
]

instance SimMotorTorqueMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSensor
]

instance SimMotorAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSensor
]

instance SimSecondaryGearboxTorqueMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSensor
]

instance SimSecondaryGearboxAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSensor
]

instance SimOutputTorqueMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSensor
]

instance SimOutputAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Engineering structural model of the first axis, described in SysML"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable motor dynamics model implemented in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable cycloidal gearbox model implemented in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
]

instance FrictionIdentificationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box and black‑box friction identification model (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) refined through continuous online identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
]

instance DiagnosticCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model generating diagnostic insights for maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

// C10: Data
instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor phase current data stream"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angular velocity derived from motor encoder angle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor torque derived from motor encoder angle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryGearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox angular velocity derived from secondary encoder angle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox torque derived from secondary encoder angle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured robot output shaft angular velocity derived from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured robot output shaft torque derived from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque from Simulink model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimMotorTorqueMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedMotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angular velocity from Simulink model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimMotorAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedSecondaryGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque from Simulink model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimSecondaryGearboxTorqueMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedSecondaryGearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox angular velocity from Simulink model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimSecondaryGearboxAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated robot output shaft torque from Simulink model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimOutputTorqueMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedOutputAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated robot output shaft angular velocity from Simulink model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimOutputAngularVelocityMeasurementTransmitted
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling real‑time sensor data streaming from PT to DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService
]

instance SimulinkExecutionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink runtime enabling execution of executable physics models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing asset description and integration with external systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables DiagnosticInsightService, ModelDataProvisionService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard displaying measured vs simulated motor, gearbox, and output shaft data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataComparisonInsight
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification and refinement of white‑box and black‑box friction models to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterRefinementInsight, ImprovedControllerTuningInsight
]

instance DiagnosticInsightService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Diagnostics generation for maintenance and engineering decision‑making, leveraging AAS integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceDiagnosticsInsight
]

instance ModelDataProvisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provision of updated digital twin model data to operators and control systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateModelDataForOperatorsAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParameterRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into refined friction parameters obtained through online identification"
]

instance ImprovedControllerTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that guides controller tuning for enhanced motion accuracy"
]

instance RealTimeDataComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight comparing real‑time measured data with simulated data for performance monitoring"
]

instance MaintenanceDiagnosticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic insight identifying potential maintenance actions on the robot axis"
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateModelDataForOperatorsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of digital twin model data for operators and control systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggested maintenance action based on diagnostic insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time operation driven by the robot’s control cycles; data acquisition and model execution occur synchronously with the robot’s operation, enabling online friction identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated constellation comprising the PT asset, its structural engineering model, simulation models, data calculation components, processing unit, data traces, AAS, and dashboard, all linked via MQTT and AAS interfaces"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers Design (ideal, friction‑free simulation) and Operation (continuous identification & tuning of friction during real‑time operation) stages of the robot"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceable data lineage from sensor source through simulation models to output traces; continuous comparison between measured and simulated signals; use of both analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) friction models to enhance model validity; acknowledgment that model parameters may drift over time due to wear"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor and actuator data are transmitted over MQTT; Asset Administration Shells provide standardized interfaces; simulations are invoked by the processing component to generate output traces"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Utilization of SysML for MBSE modeling and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial interoperability; adherence to MBSE practices without explicit ISO numbering in the text."
]
